h1.visual_description: Not present on this page, but typically the document title in a larger, centered bold font.
h1.example_text: SOLAR 10.7B: Scaling Large Language Models with Depth Up-Scaling

h2.visual_description: Bold, numbered (e.g., 4.2), left-aligned, significantly larger than body text with spacing above.

h3.visual_description: Bold, numbered with sub-indices (e.g., 4.3.1), left-aligned, slightly larger than body text.

inline_header.visual_description: Bold text at the start of a paragraph, followed by a period, used for sub-topics.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Internal cross-references (citations, tables, sections, appendices) or external hyperlinks.
Footnote markers linking to citations or URLs at the bottom of the page.
Indicates the highest/best performing value for a specific metric column.

visual_matchers.pattern: Light purple row shading in tables
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Highlights models belonging to the SOLAR 10.7B family.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX style using dollar signs (e.g., $H6$ score) or superscript notation.
markdown_grammar.table_style: markdown (standard academic style with horizontal rules and no vertical borders)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical author-year format, e.g., (Beeching et al., 2023).

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column layout for body text, with full-width tables at the top)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footnotes at the bottom of the page starting with a superscript digit followed by a URL or text.
